variables.input: fetch metrics | filter matchesPhrase(metric.key, "snmp") | summarize by: {snmp_host} | fields snmp_host
fetch metrics | filter matchesPhrase(metric.key, "snmp.if") | summarize by: {interface} | fields interface

1.content:
# 📡 [SNMP] Generic Device Dashboard
Dashboard genérico para monitoramento de dispositivos via SNMP. Use as variáveis acima para filtrar por host ou interface.

3.title: System Uptime by Device (days)
3.query:
timeseries uptime = min(snmp.sysUpTimeInstance), by: {snmp_host}
| fieldsAdd uptimeDays = uptime[]/8640000

4.title: Device Interface Status (Admin vs Oper)
4.query:
timeseries adminStatus = max(snmp.ifAdminStatus), operStatus = max(snmp.ifOperStatus), by: {snmp_host}
| fieldsAdd statusDiff = adminStatus[] - operStatus[]

6.title: Device Interfaces — Speed, Octets In/Out
6.query:
fetch metrics
| filter metric.key in ("snmp.ifSpeed", "snmp.ifHighSpeed", "snmp.ifHCInOctets", "snmp.ifHCOutOctets")
| summarize ifSpeed     = max(if(metric.key == "snmp.ifSpeed",       value, null)),
            ifHighSpeed = max(if(metric.key == "snmp.ifHighSpeed",   value, null)),
            octetsIn    = max(if(metric.key == "snmp.ifHCInOctets",  value, null)),
            octetsOut   = max(if(metric.key == "snmp.ifHCOutOctets", value, null)),
            by: {snmp_host, interface}
| sort octetsIn desc

7.title: Inbound Bandwidth Utilization (%)
7.query:
timeseries inOctets = avg(snmp.ifHCInOctets), highSpeed = avg(snmp.ifHighSpeed), by: {snmp_host, interface}
| fieldsAdd inboundUtil = (inOctets[] * 8.0 * 100.0) / (highSpeed[] * 1000000.0)

8.title: Outbound Bandwidth Utilization (%)
8.query:
timeseries outOctets = avg(snmp.ifHCOutOctets), highSpeed = avg(snmp.ifHighSpeed), by: {snmp_host, interface}
| fieldsAdd outboundUtil = (outOctets[] * 8.0 * 100.0) / (highSpeed[] * 1000000.0)

10.title: Average Inbound Packets (Broadcast + Multicast)
10.query: timeseries broadcastIn = avg(snmp.ifHCInBroadcastPkts), multicastIn = avg(snmp.ifHCInMulticastPkts), by: {snmp_host, interface}

11.title: Average Outbound Packets (Broadcast + Multicast)
11.query: timeseries broadcastOut = avg(snmp.ifHCOutBroadcastPkts), multicastOut = avg(snmp.ifHCOutMulticastPkts), by: {snmp_host, interface}

14.title: Top 15 — Inbound Interface Errors by Device (packets)
14.query:
fetch metrics
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifInErrors"
| summarize totalErrors = sum(value), by: {snmp_host}
| sort totalErrors desc
| limit 15

15.title: Top 15 — Outbound Interface Errors by Device (packets)
15.query:
fetch metrics
| filter metric.key == "snmp.ifOutErrors"
| summarize totalErrors = sum(value), by: {snmp_host}
| sort totalErrors desc
| limit 15

17.title: Average Memory Utilization (%)
17.query:
timeseries memUsed = avg(snmp.cpmCPUMemoryUsed), memFree = avg(snmp.cpmCPUMemoryFree), by: {snmp_host}
| fieldsAdd memUtil = (memUsed[] / (memUsed[] + memFree[])) * 100.0

18.title: Average CPU Utilization (%)
18.query: timeseries cpuInterval = avg(snmp.cpmCPUTotalMonIntervalValue), cpuProcessor = avg(snmp.hrProcessorLoad), cpu1min = avg(snmp.cpmCPUTotal1minRev), by: {snmp_host}
